web.title: VQ Scan: Purpose, Procedure, Risks, Recovery & Results
web.description: A VQ scan is a two-part test that providers most commonly use to diagnose a blood clot in your lungs (pulmonary embolism).

web.title: VQ Scan - InsideRadiology
web.description: The aim of the scan is to look for evidence of any blood clot in the lungs, called pulmonary embolism (PE).

web.title: Nuclear stress test - Mayo Clinic
web.description: Overview. A nuclear stress test is an imaging test that shows how blood goes to the heart at rest and during exercise.
